DEFENDANT TERRI LOEWENTHAL IS PRESENT. **DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE ISSUES.** NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
